title: 「AI 消费元年」叩门：国务院《扩大消费「十五五」规划》＋八部门《AI＋消费》＋WAIC 2026 首发季——中国 AI 产业范式从「上游军备」切换到「下游红利」
title_en: China's 'AI-Consumer Year' Arrives: 15th Five-Year Consumption Plan + 8-Ministry AI+Consumption Directive + WAIC 2026 Debut Season—A Paradigm Shift from 'Upstream Arms Race' to 'Downstream Payoff'
summary: 2026 年 7 月 13 日中国政府网挂出国务院《扩大消费「十五五」规划》——目标 2030 年社会消费品零售总额 60 万亿元，「深入推进人工智能＋消费」被写进国家纲领。同一周，八部门联合印发的《人工智能＋消费实施意见》（商建发 2026 年第 89 号，5 大方面 17 条举措）进入落地窗口，个人消费贷款贴息首次覆盖 AI 产品购买。7 月 13 日上海张江与徐汇分别迎来两大重磅：阶跃星辰发布全球首个大模型原生 AI 终端品牌 STEPX、首款智能体手机 STEPX Neo 与智能体原生系统 Step AOS；东方算芯发布并量产全球首款基于国产 14nm 的 3D 堆叠近存计算 AI 芯片 DF1000。WAIC 2026（7 月 17-20 日，10 万平方米、1100 余家企业、300+ 全球首发）进入 3 天倒计时。本文从事实盘点、政策底层逻辑、终端硬件二重奏（芯片＋整机）、消费级红利五大板块、真实市场信号、投资与风险清单、全球比较 7 个维度深度拆解——中国 AI 产业范式如何在 2026 年 7 月这一周从「上游算力/模型军备」明确切换到「下游消费级红利」，「AI 消费元年」正式叩门。
summary_en: On July 13, 2026, gov.cn officially released the State Council's 15th Five-Year Consumption Expansion Plan (No. 66)—targeting RMB 60 trillion in retail sales by 2030 and writing 'deepen AI+Consumption' into the national blueprint. The same week, the 8-ministry joint Implementation Opinions on AI+Consumption (No. 89, 5 pillars, 17 measures) entered execution—individual consumer-loan subsidies now cover AI product purchases for the first time. Also on July 13, StepFun launched STEPX, the world's first LLM-native AI terminal brand, along with the flagship agentic phone STEPX Neo and agent-native OS Step AOS, in Shanghai Zhangjiang; Dongfang Suanxin taped out and volume-produced DF1000, the world's first 3D-stacked near-memory AI chip on domestic 14nm. WAIC 2026 (July 17-20, 100,000 sqm, 1,100+ exhibitors, 300+ global debuts) is 3 days away. This article dissects across seven axes—fact-check, policy foundations, terminal-hardware duet (chip + device), five consumer-grade payoff blocs, real-world market signals, investment & risk checklist, and global benchmarking—how the July-2026 week decisively pivoted China's AI industry from 'upstream compute/model arms race' to 'downstream consumer-grade payoff'. The 'AI Consumer Year' has officially arrived.
author: AI News Daily
source: AI News Daily 综合分析
